title: Xtra Smoky Filipino Mung Bean Sprouts Bistek
description: A smoky and savory Filipino dish featuring mung bean sprouts, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this keto-friendly bistek is both flavorful and nutritious. It combines the natural sweetness of mung bean sprouts with the depth of smoky flavor.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add diced smoked bacon and cook until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add sliced onion to the skillet and cook until it starts to caramelize.
Add minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add mung bean sprouts to the skillet and cook until they start to soften.
In a small bowl, mix together fish sauce, calamansi juice, salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika.
Pour the sauce mixture over the mung bean sprouts and stir to combine.
Return the cooked bacon to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the flavors are fully incorporated.
